explanation: The recommendation teaches selection and operation of an AWS CloudTrail organization trail, but its service scope lists only AWS Organizations. Omitting CloudTrail makes the structured scope inconsistent with the statement and evidence.
required_action: Add AWS CloudTrail to scope.services and retain AWS Organizations for the organization boundary.
suggested_revision: scope.services should include AWS CloudTrail and AWS Organizations.

supporting_source.locator: Creating a trail for an organization
supporting_source.title: Creating a trail for an organization
